# Brieflytics

> The analytics tool that talks to you.

Brieflytics is a privacy-first web analytics platform that sends plain English summaries and AI-powered growth suggestions directly to your Telegram or email. There is no dashboard to log into.

## What it does
- Tracks website visitors, pageviews, traffic sources, devices, and countries
- Generates weekly or daily plain English analytics reports
- Provides AI-generated growth suggestions based on your data
- Delivers reports via Telegram message or email

## Key features
- No cookies — fully cookieless tracking
- GDPR compliant — no consent banner required
- EU-hosted — all data stored in Frankfurt, Germany
- No dashboard — everything delivered as a message
- One-line embed — single script tag, no npm required
- $5/month — 14-day free trial, no credit card required

## How to use
1. Sign up at https://brieflytics.com/signup (email only, no card)
2. Embed one line of code on your website
3. Connect Telegram or use email for report delivery
4. Receive weekly plain English reports with growth tips

## Pricing
$5/month after a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start. Cancel anytime.

## Privacy
- No cookies or persistent identifiers
- IP addresses used only for geolocation, then immediately discarded
- Data stored in EU (Frankfurt, Germany)
- Compliant with GDPR and ePrivacy Directive

## Links
- Homepage: https://brieflytics.com
- Sign up: https://brieflytics.com/signup
- Privacy policy: https://brieflytics.com/privacy
- Support: panamadonne@proton.me
